data.content: Plan: For each of the 6 skill files in skills/*.md, add --add-handoff-capsule with full agent metadata args to: (1) success paths that currently lack it (planning.md, shipment.md), (2) all failure mode paths across all files that currently only use --add-note. The handoff capsule pattern from implementation.md will be used as the template. Each file will get a new step before the final transition for success, and each failure mode will get an --add-handoff-capsule call alongside its --add-note.
